action.reasoning: Observation: Training completed 3 epochs in ~918 seconds (~15 min). mIoU reached 0.2813 after 3 epochs. The model is working. Analysis: 3 epochs took 15 min, so ~5 min/epoch. With 7.68 hours remaining and 27 iterations left, I can train for many more epochs. The model is still improving (0.2151 → 0.2619 → 0.2813). I should submit eval first to get a baseline score, then continue training longer. Decision: Submit eval with current best checkpoint, then train for more epochs.
